name: recoil_state_main_menu_transition_on_try_become_current
description: RecoilStateMainMenuTransition::OnTryBecomeCurrent activates video/HUD/audio pause and main-menu dialog setup.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 81 unmasked mismatches after relocation masking; Binary Ninja body is 321 bytes and the VC object body is 304 bytes with 5 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.

Reviewed drift is concentrated after operator new for HudUiMainMenuDialog: the retail body stores the allocation in a stack temp and emits constructor-EH cleanup state before the null branch, while the current source's explicit operator new plus Constructor call lets VC5 keep the allocation in ECX and produce a shorter branch sequence.

The native smoke covers the frontend route: software-renderer skip of the blit callback, half-res/invalidate setup, active-sound snapshot capture and stop, DIALOG sample-set initialization, HudUiMainMenuDialog construction and enable, disabled CD-audio branch, skip-exit reset, and retained dialog/snapshot pointers.
